evals.prompt: Pull review feedback for PR 182 in this repo and show only new actionable comments.
evals.expected_output: Output shows normalized review sections for new review rounds without dumping raw GitHub API payloads.
assertions: When new reviews exist, stdout includes at least one section heading that starts with === and ends with ===
Human inline comments are rendered as In `path`: Around line N: [comment_text]
Stdout does not contain raw API object keys such as "pull_request_review_id" or "submitted_at"

evals.prompt: Fetch PR 182 review comments with --compact so I can triage quickly.
evals.expected_output: Compact output contains reviewer/file summary only and omits full per-review bodies.
assertions: Stdout includes a summary line matching <n> new review(s) — <reviewers>
Output includes a Files with comments section when inline comments exist
Compact mode stdout does not include === CodeRabbit Review === or === Review by <login> === blocks

evals.prompt: Run the review fetch twice for the same PR and confirm the second run suppresses already-seen reviews.
evals.expected_output: Second run reports no new reviews when no additional review rounds were submitted.
assertions: First run creates a cache file at ~/.cache/code-review-fetch/<host>_<owner>_<repo>_<pr>.json
Second run writes [No new reviews since last run.] to stderr when review set is unchanged
Second run does not reprint previously emitted review sections
